# Beudox HR - Technical Context for AI Assistants

## Architecture Overview

Beudox HR is a modern React-based HR management system built with TypeScript, featuring a component-driven architecture with clear separation of concerns. The application follows a client-server model using Supabase as the backend.

### Frontend Architecture

**Framework & Build Tools:**
- React 18 with modern hooks and concurrent features
- TypeScript for type safety
- Vite for fast development and optimized production builds
- SWC for fast TypeScript compilation

**State Management:**
- TanStack Query for server state management and caching
- React Context for authentication state
- Local component state with useState/useReducer

**Routing & Navigation:**
- React Router v6 with protected routes
- Role-based route protection
- Programmatic navigation with useNavigate

**UI Component System:**
- shadcn/ui built on Radix UI primitives
- Tailwind CSS for styling
- Custom design tokens and CSS variables
- Responsive design with mobile-first approach

### Backend Integration

**Supabase Services:**
- PostgreSQL database with real-time capabilities
- Authentication with JWT tokens
- Row Level Security (RLS) policies
- Edge Functions for server-side logic
- Storage for file uploads

**API Patterns:**
- RESTful endpoints via Supabase client
- Real-time subscriptions for live updates
- Optimistic updates with error handling
- Request/response interceptors

## Key Files & Components

### Application Entry Points
- `src/main.tsx` - React root rendering
- `src/App.tsx` - Main application component with routing
- `src/pages/Index.tsx` - Placeholder page (not used in routing)

### Core Components
- `src/components/layout/AppLayout.tsx` - Main layout wrapper
- `src/components/layout/AppSidebar.tsx` - Navigation sidebar
- `src/components/layout/TopBar.tsx` - Top navigation bar
- `src/components/BeudoxLogo.tsx` - Logo component with variants

### Authentication & Authorization
- `src/hooks/useAuth.tsx` - Authentication state management
- `src/lib/role-access.ts` - Role-based access control logic
- Protected routes with `canAccess()` function

### Data Layer
- `src/integrations/supabase/client.ts` - Supabase client configuration
- `src/integrations/supabase/types.ts` - Generated TypeScript types
- Query hooks using TanStack Query patterns

### Utility Libraries
- `src/lib/utils.ts` - General utility functions (cn for class merging)
- `src/lib/format-date.ts` - Date formatting utilities
- `src/lib/leave-utils.ts` - Leave calculation logic
- `src/lib/client-activity.ts` - Activity logging utilities

## Data Flow & Business Logic

### Authentication Flow
1. User login → Supabase auth
2. JWT token storage
3. Employee data fetching
4. Role-based route access
5. Automatic redirects based on auth state

### Employee Management
- CRUD operations for employee records
- Profile data with avatar uploads
- Role assignments and department associations
- Invitation system with email workflows

### Evaluation System
- **Quarterly Evaluations**: Structured performance reviews
  - Evaluator selection
  - Score calculation (1-5 scale)
  - Comments and recommendations
  - Visibility based on user roles
- **Daily Evaluations**: Peer feedback system
  - Direction-based (received/given)
  - Role-based filtering
  - Timeline aggregation

### Financial Processing
- Payroll calculation with overtime
- Expense tracking and categorization
- Invoice generation with PDF export
- Financial reporting with trend analysis

### Leave Management
- Leave request workflow
- Balance calculations
- Approval processes
- Calendar integration

## Database Schema Highlights

### Core Tables
- `employees` - User profiles and organizational data
- `companies` - Multi-tenant company information
- `departments` - Organizational structure
- `roles` - Permission levels

### HR Operations
- `evaluations` - Quarterly performance reviews
- `daily_evaluations` - Daily feedback records
- `leave_requests` - Leave management
- `payroll_records` - Salary processing
- `loans` - Employee loan tracking

### Business Entities
- `projects` - Project management
- `clients` - Client relationships
- `invoices` - Billing and invoicing
- `expenses` - Business expenses

### Configuration
- `hr_policies` - Policy documents
- `public_holidays` - Holiday calendar
- `expense_categories` - Expense classification
- `leave_types` - Leave categories

## Component Patterns

### UI Components
- Extensive use of shadcn/ui components
- Consistent styling with Tailwind classes
- Custom variants and compound components
- Accessible components with proper ARIA attributes

### Form Handling
- React Hook Form for performance
- Zod schemas for validation
- Controlled components with proper error states
- File upload handling with drag-and-drop

### Data Display
- Table components with sorting and filtering
- Chart components using Recharts
- Timeline views for historical data
- Searchable select components

### Layout Patterns
- Responsive sidebar navigation
- Breadcrumb navigation
- Modal and sheet overlays
- Toast notifications

## Development Workflow

### Build Process
- Vite for fast HMR development
- TypeScript compilation with SWC
- CSS processing with PostCSS and Tailwind
- Asset optimization and bundling

### Testing Strategy
- Vitest for unit testing
- React Testing Library for component tests
- Playwright for E2E testing
- Test utilities and mocking

### Code Quality
- ESLint with React and TypeScript rules
- Prettier for code formatting
- Husky for git hooks
- TypeScript strict mode

## Deployment Considerations

### Environment Configuration
- Environment variables for Supabase
- Build-time configuration
- Runtime configuration checks

### Performance Optimization
- Code splitting with dynamic imports
- Image optimization
- Bundle analysis
- Caching strategies

### Security
- Supabase RLS policies
- JWT token handling
- Input validation and sanitization
- XSS protection

## Integration Points

### External Services
- Supabase for backend services
- Email sending via Supabase functions
- File storage and CDN
- PDF generation for invoices

### Third-party Libraries
- Date handling with date-fns
- Rich text editing with TipTap
- Chart rendering with Recharts
- Form validation with Zod
- HTTP client via Supabase JS

This technical context provides the foundation for understanding the Beudox HR codebase architecture, patterns, and implementation details.
